metadata.description: Regional norms and ruthless reduction order for concise CVs.

reduction_order: Consolidate roles > 10 years into one line
Remove generic responsibilities duplicated across roles
Merge low-signal skills and remove basics (e.g., Microsoft Word)
Cut niche side projects not aligned to JD
Shorten older role bullets to outcomes only
jd_targeting_checklist: Tailor executive summary to JD keywords and pain points
Prioritize bullets that solve JD problems
Remove unrelated achievements even if impressive
